subcodes.first_line: O Mihdi! Upon thee be My glory! Hearken unto the Call from the precincts of 'Akká, for verily He remembereth thee even as He remembered thee before [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا مهدی علیک بهائی اسمع الندآء من شطر عکاء انه یذکرک کما ذکرک من قبل
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @martyrs and martyrdom, @justice and wrath of God, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant
